> [!WARNING]
> External pull requests are not accepted in this repository.
> Specification changes go through [Discussions](https://github.com/podlite/podlite-specs/discussions)
> first; the maintainer opens an integration PR after consensus is reached.

If you found a typo or bug, file an [Issue](https://github.com/podlite/podlite-specs/issues)
with the affected location instead.

For proposals, comments, or questions, open a thread in
[Discussions](https://github.com/podlite/podlite-specs/discussions).

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for details.

<!-- ----- MAINTAINERS: replace everything above when opening an integration PR ----- -->
